gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer approved the duplicate manifest batch-key guard with no actionable findings and verified planner/workflow tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_planner_materializer.py tests/test_workflow.py -q -> 106 passed

what_changed: Rejected duplicate manifest cache keys within one InMemoryManifestStore.put_many incoming batch before mutating the store.
why: Generated document KV shards should not silently hide one chunk ref behind another when a single manifest batch accidentally contains the same model/lora/template/document/chunk key twice.
